deals.title: Tilden 20ac — Steve Jimenez
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. First offer from Michael Rodriguez dead — no earnest money, RBFCU financing stalled. Clearing complete. New prospect interested in subdividing or alternate use reached out May 9. Strategy: land-only cash deal, buyer does what they want after close.
deals.next: Follow up with new prospect. Get drone footage for marketing. Lead with net after close on any offer.

logs.m: Steve sent new photos. New prospect reached out wanting to show property — interested in subdividing or alternate use. Sent her info and strategy expectations.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social. First offer confirmed dead. Drone footage flagged as next content priority.
Current offer dead — option money not received. Steve clearing property. Mindset shift — lead with net after close going forward.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Matt Toney (HouzzPro/San Antonio Remodelers) selected at $54,877. Connected Matt directly with Jerry Sadler. Dumpsters running since Saturday May 10. Chris on site today meeting Matt Toney and project manager.
deals.next: On-site visit today. Monitor work progress. Establish listing timeline once work scoped. Get police report filed.

logs.m: Chris heading to property today to meet Matt Toney and project manager on site. Dumpsters running since Saturday.
Work officially starting — Matt Toney dropping dumpsters this weekend.
Met Matt Toney in his office. Connected him directly with Jerry Sadler by phone. Goal: work starts by next Monday.
Two estimates compared: HouzzPro $54,877 vs T&T $61,980. Jerry emailed Ray Stidham recommending HouzzPro. Ray Stidham confirmed as bank decision-maker.
Kendall pricing flagged as too high. Actively shopping alternatives. Self-manage option still being explored.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: 208 DOM, underwater by $93K-$143K, sellers double-carrying mortgage plus Pearl Brewery apartment. Market value $350K-$400K vs payoff ~$493K. Three paths: short sale, VA loan assumption, or price cut and bring cash to close. Showing May 5 by outside agent. Lawn care quotes in progress.
deals.next: Get showing feedback from May 5 showing. Check on property today while in Devine. Talk to broker on short sale protocol. Call Matt and Chandler with three paths.

logs.m: Chris checking on property today while in Devine. Need showing feedback from May 5 showing. Grass still unresolved.

Express Offers returned $550K — likely off vs CMA. Showing scheduled May 4 at 2pm. Checking in with Matt and Chandler on options summary.
Full CMA completed. Underwater by $93K-$143K confirmed. Three paths documented: short sale, VA assumption, price reduction plus cash to close.

Connected with Zach Schaphorst. Paid off debt. 30-day wait for credit pull. Pre-approval target Feb 2026.
